homeBenefits.title: Our Approach to Your articles
homeBenefits.subtitle: A complete process for your articles: research, development, optimization, and hosting to make them accessible to the world.
homeBenefits.card1Desc: Study the market, competitors, and user expectations while working closely with you to clarify goals, priorities, and success criteria before development begins.
homeBenefits.card2Desc: Continuously monitor new technologies, frameworks, and tools, integrating proven innovations that can bring measurable value to your project.
homeBenefits.card3Desc: Deliver a fully operational website and host it in a reliable environment, so you launch immediately without searching for additional providers.
homeBenefits.card4Desc: Provide continuous assistance, updates, and guidance, plus practical instruction so you can confidently manage and grow your website over time.

homeDescription.slogan: Make your articles visible, shareable, and alive online.

homeFaq.q1: How long does it take to get a website live?
homeFaq.a1: Typically between a few days for a simple site and a few weeks for more complex projects.
homeFaq.q2: Do I need to know coding to support my website?
homeFaq.a2: No coding is required. We provide full support, documentation, and guidance so you can manage content and updates easily.
homeFaq.q3: Will my website be secure and reliable?
homeFaq.a3: Yes — every site is hosted, optimized, and monitored to stay online safely.
homeFaq.q4: Can I make changes to my website later?
homeFaq.a4: Absolutely — we provide guidance and documentation so you can update content anytime.
homeFaq.a5: Pricing is transparent and customizable based on your pages, features, and hosting needs.
homeFaq.title: FAQ
homeFaq.subtitle: Got questions? Find clear answers to everything about our process, services, and pricing.

homeHero.subtitle: We provide individuals with complete web solutions — from custom development to reliable hosting, everything handled for you so your website works seamlessly from start to finish.

homeNumbers.stat4Desc: Decades of experience in delivering impactful digital solutions.

homePricing.title: Flexible pricing
homePricing.desc: Your project isn't limited by preset patterns: we offer fully customizable web development and hosting tailored to your needs.

homeProcess.step4Desc: Deploy your website and host it securely, with ongoing updates, monitoring, and support.
homeProcess.title: Our process
homeProcess.subtitle: Our four-step process guides your project from planning to live deployment, keeping you informed and supported at every stage.

homeProgress.subtitle2: Insigmark restores focus, helping you prioritize what matters now and making progress purposeful.
homeProgress.subtitle3: We ensure your effort adds up to steady, sustainable progress.

homeQuote.quote: An idea shouldn't stay trapped in your head or on your laptop. We shape it, structure it, and build it into a working product ready to meet its audience.
homeQuote.subtitle: From rough concept to fully operational website, the process is designed to transform vision into something visible, usable, and lasting.

HomeRequest.title: Let’s bring your vision to life
HomeRequest.description: We’re here to make sure you can confidently trust us with your website development, hosting, and support. Reach out! Our team will respond as soon as possible.

homeServices.service1Desc: Design and build fully functional websites, blogs, portfolios, and landing pages with interactive elements, galleries, forms, and advanced features, ready for immediate use.
homeServices.service2Desc: Provide secure, high-performance hosting with daily backups, monitoring, malware protection, and scalable storage to ensure websites stay online and reliable.
homeServices.service3Desc: Perform updates, performance tweaks, security scans, and content adjustments, keeping websites up-to-date, fast, and functioning smoothly over time.
homeServices.service4Desc: Transparent pricing with clear calculations, detailed breakdowns, and customizable options so clients know exactly what they pay for and why.

homeTeam.title: Meet Our Experts
homeTeam.subtitle: A team of thinkers and builders who turn articles into original, fully realized digital experiences.

homeTestimonials.col1Desc: Our approach is shaped by global industry standards.
homeTestimonials.col2Desc: We test every idea against real-world needs and user expectations before building anything, so your website works as intended from day one.
homeTestimonials.col3Desc: You review prototypes and drafts throughout the process, ensuring the site matches your vision at every stage.
homeTestimonials.col4Desc: We make sure your website loads fast, stays online, and is protected, so it's ready for visitors the moment it goes live.

company.clientsSubtitleBold: Built for individuals who need reliable delivery
company.clientsSubtitleDesc: Insigmark is structured around C2B projects. This includes creators, independent professionals, and individuals launching personal brands, portfolios, or digital products.
company.focusSubtitleBold: Practical standards that keep websites reliable
company.focusSubtitleDesc: We follow practices that make websites easier to maintain and safer to operate. That includes performance planning, infrastructure setup, and clear documentation.
company.focusCard2TitleNew: Step-by-step feedback during key project stages
company.focusCard3TitleNew: Optimized launch with hosting configuration and monitoring
company.focusCard4TitleNew: Security measures integrated into infrastructure and maintenance
company.heroSubtitle: We build and host websites as complete systems. Development, infrastructure, security, and long-term support are handled together to keep your website fast, stable, and ready to grow.
company.infoDesc: If you're ready to launch a website or improve an existing one, tell us what you're building. We'll review your request and reply with the next steps.
company.pricingDesc: Our price range depends on the complexity of the website and the infrastructure required to run it reliably.
company.pricingDesc2: Development, hosting, and maintenance can be combined into a single complete solution or provided as separate services.
company.processStep1: Discussion and requirements gathering to understand your goals
company.processStep2: Planning the architecture, design, and project timeline
company.processStep3: Development, testing, and iterative review with your feedback
company.processStep4: Deployment, hosting setup, and ongoing support
company.processDesc: A website works best when planning, development, and hosting decisions support each other. Our process is structured, transparent, and designed to reduce risk during development and after launch.
company.processWorkLabel: Our workflow is built around four stages:
company.svc1: Website development from landing pages to complex platforms
company.svc2: Hosting environments matched to the project's scale
company.svc3: Security, audit, and maintenance services that keep websites stable over time
company.svc4: Technical optimization focused on performance and real user experience
company.svc5: Documentation and handover so clients can manage content confidently
company.servicesSubtitle: Complex web development, hosting, and maintenance
company.servicesDesc: Insigmark provides end-to-end web solutions designed for individuals who need reliable results without juggling multiple providers.
company.techSubtitleDesc: We use modern frameworks and infrastructure tools selected for stability, scalability, and performance.

contactPage.directDescription: If you would like to contact us directly instead of submitting the form, you can reach our team using the details below.
contactPage.directNote: Our team monitors incoming messages regularly and will respond as soon as possible.
contactPage.companyInfoDescription: If you're ready to launch a website or improve an existing one, tell us what you're building. We'll review your request and reply with the next steps.
contactPage.companyCardText: We provide complete web development, hosting, and digital infrastructure solutions designed to support websites from the first idea to long-term operation.
contactPage.finalDescription: If you're ready to start your project or explore the best technical solution for your website, our team will be happy to assist you.
contactPage.heroDescription: Building a website involves more than design. Development architecture, hosting infrastructure, performance optimization, and long-term maintenance all play an important role. Tell us about your project, and we will review your request and guide you through the next steps.
contactPage.planningItem1: The purpose of the website and its target audience
contactPage.planningItem2: The number of pages or sections required
contactPage.planningItem3: Any advanced features such as forms, dashboards, or integrations
contactPage.planningDescription: Every project begins with understanding your goals. Before development begins, it is important to define the website's purpose, required functionality, and expected infrastructure.
contactPage.planningLead: During the initial discussion, we usually evaluate:
contactPage.planningNote: This helps ensure that development decisions align with the project's long-term goals.
contactPage.reviewItem1: Reviewing your project idea and technical requirements
contactPage.reviewItem2: Identifying the most suitable development approach
contactPage.reviewItem4: Preparing an initial proposal or consultation response
contactPage.reviewTitle: What Happens After You Send a Request
contactPage.reviewDescription: After receiving your message, our team reviews the information to understand the scope of your project.
contactPage.reviewNote: Once this evaluation is complete, we will contact you to discuss the next stage of the project.

faq.contactDesc: If you didn't find the answer you were looking for, send us your request. Our team will review it and get back to you shortly.
faq.heroTitle: Questions You Might Have Before Starting
faq.heroSubtitle: Planning a website or upgrading your hosting infrastructure often raises many questions. Here you’ll find clear answers about development, hosting, security, and how we work.
faq.heroText: If you still need help, our team is always available to guide you.
faq.startQ1: How do I start a project with Insigmark?
faq.startA1: The process usually begins with a brief consultation in which we discuss your idea, goals, and technical requirements. After that, we define the project scope and development plan.
faq.startQ2: What information should I prepare before contacting you?
faq.startA2: It helps to have a general idea of your website's purpose, number of pages, desired features, and whether you need hosting or migration.
faq.startQ3: Do you work with individuals or only companies?
faq.startA3: Our services are designed primarily for individuals and independent creators who want reliable website solutions.
faq.startQ4: Can you help if I only have an idea but no technical plan?
faq.startA4: Yes. Many projects start exactly this way. We help structure the idea, define the architecture, and determine the best development approach.
faq.startQ5: Can my project grow later if I start small?
faq.startA5: Yes. Websites can be expanded with additional pages, features, or infrastructure upgrades as the project evolves.
faq.webQ1: What types of websites do you build?
faq.webA1: We develop a wide range of websites, including portfolios, blogs, landing pages, informational websites, and complex platforms with advanced functionality.
faq.webQ2: Do you build websites using WordPress?
faq.webA2: Yes, WordPress can be used for projects that benefit from content management systems and rapid deployment.
faq.webQ3: Do you also build fully custom websites?
faq.webA3: Yes. Some projects require custom development using modern frameworks to support advanced functionality or scalability.
faq.webQ4: Can my website include integrations with other services?
faq.webA4: Yes. Websites can integrate with external systems such as payment platforms, analytics tools, APIs, and other online services.
faq.webQ5: Will my website work on mobile devices?
faq.webA5: Yes. Every website is designed to be responsive, so it functions properly across mobile phones, tablets, and desktop devices.
faq.hostQ1: Do I need separate hosting for my website?
faq.hostA1: No. Hosting can be provided together with development, so the website is ready to launch immediately.
faq.hostA2: Hosting environments include shared hosting, managed WordPress hosting, VPS infrastructure, and dedicated servers, depending on project size.
faq.hostQ3: Can you host websites that were built elsewhere?
faq.hostA3: Yes. Existing websites can be migrated and hosted on our infrastructure.
faq.hostQ4: Will my website remain online during high traffic?
faq.hostA4: Scalable hosting environments help maintain stability even when traffic increases.
faq.hostA5: Yes. Hosting environments can be upgraded as your website grows and requires additional resources.
faq.secA1: Security measures may include firewalls, malware monitoring, secure server configuration, and encrypted connections.
faq.secA2: Yes. Maintenance services can include updates, performance monitoring, and security improvements.
faq.secA3: Technical support is available to identify issues and restore normal functionality.
faq.secA4: Backup systems are used to create copies of website data, which can be restored if necessary.
faq.secA5: Maintenance is recommended for websites that require updates, security monitoring, or performance optimization.
faq.priceQ1: How much does a website usually cost?
faq.priceA1: Project pricing depends on the website's complexity, required features, and hosting infrastructure.
faq.priceA2: Yes. Each service includes clear explanations so clients understand exactly what they are paying for.
faq.priceA3: Yes. Some projects fit predefined service ranges while others require custom solutions.
faq.priceA4: Yes. Payment can be structured either as a single payment or stage-by-stage, depending on the project.
faq.priceQ5: Is hosting included in the price?
faq.priceA5: Hosting may be included in certain packages or selected separately depending on your needs.

forgotPasswordSuccessPage.title: Success!
forgotPasswordSuccessPage.description: Check your inbox – we just sent a password reset link. Can’t find the email? Make sure to check your spam or promotions folder.

hosting.heroSubtitle: Reliable hosting that keeps your website online, fast, and secure from day one.

pricing.approachTitle: We believe in transparent and fair pricing. The more comprehensive the solution you choose, the more value you get — complex projects come with built-in discounts.
pricing.approachDesc: Every service has a clear cost, so you can see exactly what you're paying for. By combining multiple services, you benefit from savings while getting a complete, tailored solution for your website, hosting, maintenance, and support.
pricing.standardFeature1: 6–10 page website with forms and gallery
pricing.premiumFeature1: 10+ page website with e-commerce/CMS and user accounts
pricing.packagesIntro: If you're ready to shape your project with us, our complex solutions may inspire you!
pricing.singlePaymentDesc: Pay the full project cost in one invoice. This simplifies the process and secures all stages upfront. Prepayment covers development, hosting, maintenance, and documentation.
pricing.stagePaymentDesc: Pay per project stage as you go. Prepayment is required for each stage before work begins, ensuring transparency and control while keeping the project moving smoothly.
pricing.quoteText: We like to keep it simple — you should always know what you're paying for and why. No surprises, no hidden fees.
pricing.quoteDesc: We break down website development, hosting, and support into meaningful components. Every feature, page, and optimization step is considered, so pricing is fair, predictable, and tailored to your project's needs.
pricing.whyItMattersDesc: Hidden fees or one-size-fits-all packages don't exist here. You pay only for what adds real value, with flexibility to adjust as your project evolves.
pricing.requestTitle: Let's bring your vision to life
pricing.requestDesc: We're here to make sure you can confidently trust us with your website development, hosting, and support. Reach out! Our team will respond as soon as possible.

sam.heroSubtitle: Keeping your website secure, reliable, and performing at its best.

pkg1.name: Clarity Foundation
pkg1.boldIntro: For entrepreneurs who are laying the groundwork for scalable growth.
pkg1.desc: This package is designed for businesses in the early stages of development, helping them define their direction and establish a strong foundation for future growth.
pkg1.item1Desc: Deep dive into your business vision to ensure alignment with your core values and long-term goals.
pkg1.item2Desc: Research to understand your industry, competitors, and target market, with actionable insights for your next steps.
pkg1.item3Desc: A detailed analysis of your Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, and Threats, laying the groundwork for strategic decisions.
pkg1.item4Desc: Define clear, measurable, and actionable goals that align with your business vision.
pkg1.item5Desc: A roadmap of prioritized actions that will enable you to execute on your vision and reach your goals efficiently.
pkg1.item6Desc: A one-on-one session with our senior strategists to refine your plan and approach.

pkg2.name: Growth Momentum
pkg2.boldIntro: For businesses that need to refine their positioning and systems for continued growth.
pkg2.desc: This package is for businesses beyond the startup phase looking to optimize operations, solidify their market position, and build systems for sustainable expansion.
pkg2.item1Desc: Refine what sets you apart in the market and clarify your value proposition to your target audience.
pkg2.item2Desc: Identify and define key customer segments to tailor your messaging and offerings to.
pkg2.item3Desc: Create a persuasive messaging framework that communicates your brand's value and resonates with your audience.
pkg2.item4Desc: Develop competitive and aligned pricing structures that reflect your brand value and target market.
pkg2.item5Desc: Design efficient processes that enable you to scale without sacrificing quality or customer experience.
pkg2.item6Desc: Streamline core operational systems to ensure smooth and efficient daily operations as you scale.
pkg2.item7Desc: Monthly check-ins to review progress, adjust strategy, and keep the momentum going.

pkg3.name: Strategic Expansion
pkg3.boldIntro: For businesses that are ready to expand and refine their approach to new markets and broader operations.
pkg3.desc: This package supports businesses that have reached the growth phase and are now looking to refine their strategies for expansion into new markets or verticals, and strengthen their operational foundations for scaling.
pkg3.item1Desc: Detailed planning to help you align your expansion efforts with business goals and market demands.
pkg3.item2Desc: Identifying and implementing strategies for entering new markets or adding new product lines.
pkg3.item3Desc: Develop a seamless, optimized customer journey to increase satisfaction and loyalty.
pkg3.item4Desc: Build and execute a high-impact performance marketing plan to drive awareness and sales.
pkg3.item5Desc: Boost brand visibility and engagement through targeted strategies and media exposure.
pkg3.item6Desc: Ensure your financial systems are structured for growth, with budgeting, forecasting, and reporting.
pkg3.item7Desc: Implement a project management system to keep your expansion efforts organized and on track.
pkg3.item8Desc: Ongoing collaboration with our experts to monitor progress and pivot strategies as needed.

pkg4.name: Elite Transformation
pkg4.boldIntro: For businesses that need a complete transformation — from strategic direction to operational excellence, and everything in between.
pkg4.desc: This comprehensive package is ideal for businesses ready for a full-scale transformation, covering all aspects of the business — from strategy to execution, and from operational efficiency to leadership development.
pkg4.item1Desc: Deep analysis of all operational processes, with a focus on removing bottlenecks and improving efficiency.
pkg4.item2Desc: Identify, assess, and mitigate risks to ensure your business can sustain growth even during uncertain times.
pkg4.item3Desc: Ensure your business scales seamlessly by identifying key opportunities and challenges.
pkg4.item4Desc: Provide leadership coaching and develop your team to handle growth and scale.
pkg4.item5Desc: Boost brand visibility and engagement through targeted strategies and media exposure.
pkg4.item6Title: Ongoing Strategic Review & Adjustments (up to 6 months)
pkg4.item6Desc: Continuous monitoring and adjustments to the strategy to keep your business on track.
pkg4.item7Desc: Personal consultations with our senior experts to guide you through critical growth decisions.
pkg4.item8Desc: With continuous feedback loops to track key metrics, optimize processes, and drive results.
pkg4.item9Desc: In-depth collaboration with our leadership team, including quarterly reviews, to ensure long-term success.

additionalServices.description1: 24/7 uptime monitoring with instant alerts for downtime, security threats, and performance issues.
additionalServices.description2: Dedicated testing environment mirroring your live site for safe updates and feature testing.
additionalServices.description3: Connecting third-party tools, APIs, and services to streamline your website operations and workflows.

auditSecurity.description1: Comprehensive security assessment covering vulnerabilities, access controls, and compliance gaps.
auditSecurity.description2: In-depth analysis of website speed, Core Web Vitals, and server response times with optimization recommendations.
auditSecurity.description3: Complete review of GDPR, accessibility (WCAG), and industry-standard compliance with actionable remediation plan.

backupRecovery.description1: Immediate full-site backup triggered manually or on schedule, stored securely off-site.
backupRecovery.description2: Tailored backup strategy with custom frequency, retention policies, and multi-location storage.
backupRecovery.description3: Complete recovery plan including data restoration, failover setup, and business continuity measures.

bugDetection.description1: Thorough inspection of your website to identify bugs, errors, and performance issues with a detailed report.
bugDetection.description2: Targeted resolution of specific bugs and errors to restore full website functionality.
bugDetection.description3: End-to-end bug resolution including audit, fixes, testing, and post-fix monitoring.

migrationServices.description1: Simple transfer of your website files, database, and DNS settings to a new hosting provider.
migrationServices.description2: Complete migration including email accounts, SSL certificates, and server configuration.
migrationServices.description3: Multi-site or enterprise migration with zero-downtime strategy, data validation, and post-migration support.

serverSetup.description1: Configuration of shared or WordPress servers with security, caching, and GDPR-ready settings.
serverSetup.description2: Preparation of virtual or cloud servers including OS installation, firewall, and control panel setup.
serverSetup.description3: Fine-tuning of servers for speed, scalability, and reliability, including load management and CDN integration.

complementaryServices.description1: Setting up experiments to optimize conversion rates on key pages.
complementaryServices.description2: Implementing Google Analytics, heatmaps, and custom dashboards for insights.
complementaryServices.description3: Configuring websites for 2–3 languages with proper hreflang tags.
complementaryServices.description4: Integrating third-party tools like calendars, forms, or other services.

documentationSupport.description1: A manual (PDF/video) explaining login, setup, and content editing
documentationSupport.description2: Detailed documentation of code structure, API endpoints, and maintenance procedures.
documentationSupport.description3: Complete project handover including hosting access, update procedures, and changelog.
documentationSupport.description4: Live training sessions and a custom playbook to ensure clients understand their website fully.

preDevelopmentResearch.description1: A review of 3–5 similar websites to identify features, gaps, and opportunities.
preDevelopmentResearch.description2: Identifying target audiences and uncovering relevant keywords for reach and visibility.
preDevelopmentResearch.description3: Assessing platforms, hosting requirements, and technical constraints for smooth implementation.
preDevelopmentResearch.description4: Creating wireframes, user flows, and sitemaps to guide website structure and functionality.

technicalOptimization.description1: Improving page load times through image compression, caching, and code minification.
technicalOptimization.description2: Enhancing LCP, FCP, CLS, and mobile performance to meet Google's performance standards.
technicalOptimization.description3: Correcting crawl errors, implementing schema, robots.txt, HTTPS migration for search engine visibility.
technicalOptimization.description4: Ensuring WCAG compliance with alt texts, keyboard navigation, and other accessibility standards.

webDevelopmentFullWebsite.description1: A 3–5 page site including Home, About, Contact, Blog; ready to go live.
webDevelopmentFullWebsite.description2: Includes forms, galleries, and basic integrations; ideal for more detailed portfolios or personal sites.
webDevelopmentFullWebsite.description3: Full-featured website with e-commerce cart, user accounts, custom animations, and interactive elements.
webDevelopmentFullWebsite.description4: Complex sites with API integrations, payments, memberships, and advanced UX; fully functional online solution.

webDevelopmentPagesSections.description1: Responsive design, SEO-friendly, essential content pages.
webDevelopmentPagesSections.description2: Pages integrated with CMS, images, and text content.
webDevelopmentPagesSections.description3: Pages or widgets with forms, maps, and anti-spam protection.
webDevelopmentPagesSections.description4: Dynamic grids and lightbox galleries for showcasing work.
webDevelopmentPagesSections.description5: Product catalog and checkout functionality for online sales.
webDevelopmentPagesSections.description6: Login pages, profiles, and order management.
webDevelopmentPagesSections.description7: Special interactive features and third-party integrations.
